#### What's Changed

-   \[release-5.34] Bump c/storage to v1.57.2, c/image to v5.34.2 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2765](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2765)
-   \[5.34] Correctly compute DiffID, and try to set the correct MIME type, for non-gzip input to `tarball:` by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2807](https://redirect.github.com/containers/image/pull/2807)
